title: C Struct Basics
description: Practice grouping fields in a simple struct.
learningGoals: Read and access fields from a small struct value.

completionChecks.explanation: The dot operator reads a field from a struct object.

completionChecks.prompt: What value is stored in sum?
completionChecks.explanation: The initializer sets x to 2 and y to 3, so the sum is 5.
